page_content:
### **1. Dr. Fateme Esmailie (The Personable Leader)**
*(Friendly & warm, acknowledges personal touch)*  
**Subject:** Medical School Application Update: Arian Moridani (Senior Design Lead)  
Hi Dr. Esmailie,  
I hope you’re having a great start to 2026 — and that your cats are still getting all the treats they deserve!  
Since I led our ** Aortic Valve Model** team under your guidance, were we started working on the process to make a in-house version of a humans vasculature, while also reducing procurement costs to less than $500. Since then, I’ve been diving into machine learning and am now working toward an **M.S. in Computer Science (AI)** at Georgia Tech.  
I’m applying to medical school next cycle and thought it would be great if you could update your letter — especially since your class gave me such a strong foundation in both design thinking and technical problem-solving.  
To make this easy for you, I’ve set up an Interfolio account so all my applications can get the same letter with just one upload from you.
I'd be happy to share my updated CV, project summaries, or any materials that might help you reflect on my journey, especially how your guidance shaped it.  
Really grateful for everything you’ve supported me with — and I know how much time this takes. Thanks again for being such an important part of my journey.  
Warmly,
Arian Moridani  
---
